article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
STAR ATLAS #172 Ship Giveaway & Next Week is a BIG REVEAL week!
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video about the latest updates from Star Atlas.
Star Atlas At Play GG and San Diego Comic Con
The Hologram News Network posted a video about some events that Star Atlas will attend.
Metaverse Nomads #89 Star Atlas Co-founder departs Company?
Metaverse Nomads posted a video of their latest Star Atlas live stream.
ATMTA Sells $1.6 Million USD Worth of ATLAS and POLIS Over Last 3 Months
The Hologram published an article about some cryptocurrency sales by Star Atlas.
STAR ATLAS #173 SHOCKING NEWS. Insert Shocked Influencer Face.
The MetaVerse Explorer posted a video about the departure of one of the Star Atlas co-founders.
ATMTA Employees Speak On Quiroga Departure
The Hologram published an article with some comments from Star Atlas employees to the co-founder departure.
WEEKLY STAR ATLAS NEWSLETTER #74
Aephia published their latest Star Atlas newsletter.
Star Atlas Let’s Have A 3 way
OCG Thor posted a video comparing 3 Star Atlas ships.
Star Atlas Update : What happened this week? Town hall is coming
PockThePirate posted a video about the latest in Star Atlas.
Star Atlas Ignites Space Mining Economy with Claim Stakes Feature Release
Star Atlas published an article explaining the new Claim Stakes.
STAR ATLAS #174 Claim Stake First Experience!
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video demonstrating the Star Atlas Claim Stakes.
Star Atlas : Claim Stakes – How To
PockThePirate posted a video discussing the Star Atlas Claim Stakes.
Star Atlas, Ranking Ships… in the correct order
OCG Thor posted a video ranking the Star Atlas ships.
